verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy Bible, Book divine, Precious treasure, thou art mine; Mine, to tell me whence I came, Mine, to tell me what I am.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mine, to chide me when I rove, Mine, to show a Saviour’s love; Mine thou art to guide and guard, Mine, to punish or reward.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Mine, to comfort in distress, Suffering in this wilderness; Mine, to show, by living faith, Man can triumph over death.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Mine, to tell of joy’ to come, And the rebel sinner’s doom; Holy Bible, Book divine Precious treasure, thou art mine!
